prompt: A long bookshelf representing human languages. On the left, books are colorful, detailed, rich with scripts and texture. Moving to the right, books gradually lose detail, text fades, covers become blank. At the far right, books are completely empty and dissolving into dust in the air, with faint ghost-like silhouettes emerging from the dust symbolizing lost voices. Soft dramatic lighting, dark minimal background, emotional, symbolic, cinematic, no text, no labels, no charts, no infographic style, ultra detailed, 4k, magazine cover style.
insight: Thousands of languages are disappearing, leading to irreversible cultural and human loss.
